consignor.motivation: Consignor "SKF Eurotrade" from certificate matches invoice issuer "SKF Eurotrade AB" after allowed normalization including legal form abbreviation. Company name and country Sweden are consistent in both documents. Rule 4.1.0 (Koncernstruktur) confirmed consignor name presence in invoice. Legal form difference accepted under 4.1.3.6. Country match per 4.1.4.

consignee.motivation: Consignee "PodshipnikTechService LLP" matches bill-to party in invoice including exact address and country "Kazakhstan" after normalization. Prioritized bill-to field used for verification per 4.2.0.2. Country match verified per 4.2.3.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with an explicit invoice reference (number 8500031427 dated 09.03.2026) matching the invoice. According to rule 4.3.5 this suffices for goods description verification without requiring exact text matching.

quantity.motivation: Gross weight (GW) and net weight (NW) in kilograms from certificate match corresponding total weights in invoice within allowed truncation and rounding tolerance as per rules 4.4.2.2 and 4.4.3. No unit or category conflicts detected.

origin.certificate_value: Austria, Bulgaria, China, France, Germany, Italy, Japan
origin.invoice_value: Austria, Bulgaria, China, France, Germany, Italy, Japan
origin.motivation: All origin countries listed in certificate are explicitly found in invoice in corresponding country of manufacturing fields. EU normalization rule 4.5.4.1 is active given EU origin. China and Hong Kong normalization per 4.5.4.3 is not required here as Hong Kong is absent. No contradictory countries found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) fully match between certificate and invoice with allowed normalization and rules applied. No mismatches or ambiguities detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer exakt mellan certifikat och faktura, inklusive avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
